findings.title: Source and manifest scope sets are in parity.
findings.message: Every normalized literal scope found in source is declared, and every declaration was found.
findings.remediation: Keep this comparison in CI so later scope changes produce a reviewable diff.

findings.title: A redirect host is not covered by a declared authorized domain.
findings.message: preview.unlisted-example.test is used by a redirect URI but is not covered by oauth.authorizedDomains.
findings.remediation: Remove the redirect from the launch set or reconcile the intended authorized domain.

findings.title: The privacy-policy URL is the same as the homepage URL.
findings.message: Google requires a dedicated privacy-policy URL that differs from the submitted homepage URL.
findings.remediation: Publish a dedicated privacy page and record that exact URL in the launch manifest.

findings.title: Every declared scope maps to a feature and a recording step.
findings.message: The manifest contains a complete technical trace from scope to feature to storyboard.
findings.remediation: Record the live product as described and verify the final video manually.

storyboard.title: Open launch milestones populated from Google Calendar
